book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve indian food and should be in the expensive price range
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 1 people at 20:00 on saturday
If the booking fails how about 19:00
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should be in the north
The hotel should have a star of 2
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the type of hotel
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 3 nights starting from the same day
If the booking fails how about thursday
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
